payable","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"details":"ETH collection with soft/hard caps, OG whitelist bonus, and Safe vault forwarding  Flow: 1. Presale opens \u2014 anyone can contribute (min 0.01 ETH, max 1 ETH per wallet) 2. All ETH is immediately forwarded to a Gnosis Safe multisig vault 3. Soft cap (5 ETH) \u2014 no time limit, presale stays open until hit 4. Once soft cap is hit, hard cap phase begins (5 day timer) 5. Hard cap (12.5 ETH) or timer expires \u2192 presale closes 6. 26 OG wallets from previous presale get 10% bonus token allocation  Security improvements over V1: - ETH forwarded immediately to Safe (no funds held in contract) - Owner = Gnosis Safe (2-of-2 multisig required for admin actions) - Partial fill at hard cap (excess ETH returned, not reverted) - ERC-20 rescue function for accidentally sent tokens - No refund mechanism needed (contract balance always 0)","kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_ogWallets":"Array of 26 OG contributor addresses","_vault":"Gnosis Safe address (also recommended as msg.sender/owner for max trust)"}},"rescueTokens(address,address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to rescue","to":"Where to send the rescued tokens (should be the contributor)","token":"The ERC-20 token address"}}},"title":"ArcaPresaleV2","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"getAllocationWeight(address)":{"notice":"Get token allocation weight (contribution + OG bonus)"},"remainingCapacity()":{"notice":"Get remaining ETH capacity before hard cap"},"rescueTokens(address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Recover ERC-20 tokens accidentally sent to this contract"}},"notice":"Presale contract for $ARCA token on Base","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/ArcaPresaleV2.sol":"ArcaPresaleV2"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/ArcaPresaleV2.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2acfc1ed20ff0302ac603f3f12c3d2784ef12f34143697f36c6502cc538937f0","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://daa36aabc1d52c4d222912efe1b90ddbe0f86eb930960be0958c4d30294aeb1a","dweb:/ipfs/QmVdde8M3ZJdyEeudMA7CD6cjeFqSXNEkEM8WY85w3QeGx"]}},"version":1}

params._vault: Gnosis Safe address (also recommended as msg.sender/owner for max trust)

params.to: Where to send the rescued tokens (should be the contributor)

getAllocationWeight(address).notice: Get token allocation weight (contribution + OG bonus)

remainingCapacity().notice: Get remaining ETH capacity before hard cap

rescueTokens(address,address,uint256).notice: Recover ERC-20 tokens accidentally sent to this contract
